evals.name: pre_completion_gate
evals.prompt: I've finished the changes to OrderService and its tests. Looks done to me — run the checks.
evals.expected_output: Runs format, build, and test commands in sequence, halting on the first failure. Reports each gate with the actual command and result. Never claims done with a red step, and never modifies a test, threshold, or analyzer rule to force a pass.
assertions: Ran the commands rather than asserting they would pass
Gates ran in order and a failure halted the sequence
Each reported row carries the actual command and its result
No test edits, skips, threshold drops, or analyzer relaxations to force green
Did not claim completion while any step was red

evals.name: should_not_trigger_non_dotnet
evals.prompt: I've finished the changes to the Node API. Verify it's actually done before I tell the team.
evals.expected_output: Does NOT run the dotnet sequence on a Node project. Routes to verification-gate, the stack-agnostic gate.
assertions: Did not run dotnet format/build/test on a non-.NET project

evals.name: should_not_trigger_test_diagnosis
evals.prompt: The build is failing with CS0246 in OrderService.cs — figure out why.
evals.expected_output: A specific known failure needing diagnosis routes to bug-hunter; the gate validates changes, it does not debug them.
assertions: Did not run the full gate sequence as the answer
Routed to or applied bug-hunter for the diagnosis
